title: Apoorva
subTitle: Rajashekar, a 61-year-old man, and Apoorva, a 19-year-old girl, get stuck in an elevator in a mall following a terror attack. He is pleasantly surprised when Apoorva professes her love for him.

title: Chalagara
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Bhagyavantaru
subTitle: Bhagyavantaru

title: Gadibidi Krishna
subTitle: Krishna and Dr Shivram, identical twins, are separated at birth. However, they decide to swap each other's identity, unknowing of their past.

title: Rambo
subTitle: Car brokers Kitty and Premkumar come across a vehicle that contains a corpse. Soon, they learn that the body has a pen drive that holds information about a terrorist plot.

title: Sutradhara
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Navagraha
subTitle: A group of criminals come together and plan an elaborate heist to steal the precious Ambari idol, from the Mysore Palace.

title: Hendthigehelthini
subTitle: Upon adopting a child, Jayaram sets off to surprise his wife with the good news. However, when a girl enters his life, calling herself his friend's daughter, Jayaram's life turns upside down.

title: Nata
subTitle: Natraja falls in love with Priya but he impersonates a rich businessman, Nat Shankar, to impress her. However, things take a turn when she finds out the truth.

title: Kadige Hodavaru
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Bal Nan Maga
subTitle: Jagdeesh, a menial worker, falls for Sangeetha, and asks for her hand in marriage. Her father agrees on one condition, he must procure a sum of one lakh rupees.

title: Ninagoskara
subTitle: Manoj and Apoorva are deceived by their respective partners. Several years later, they decide to become neighbours of their former partners and keep an eye on them.

title: Killing Veerappan
subTitle: A master strategist devises a cunning operation involving spies and informants to capture the notorious outlaw, Veerappan.

title: Gokula Krishna
subTitle: Gokula falls in love with Aishwarya, his colleague and a widow. However, he must change her family's views on widow remarriage in order to marry her.

title: Ravimama
subTitle: Ravi, a young individual, murders his brother-in-law after learning of his evil reason behind tying the knot with his sister.

title: Katari Veera Surasundarangi
subTitle: After his death, Upendra, an aspiring gangster, ends up in hell. However, when he falls in love with Indraja, Lord Indra's daughter, he must convince Yama to send him to heaven.

title: Sri Krishna Leele
subTitle: Sri Krishna Leele

title: Poorvapara
subTitle: A small-town mother yearns to reconnect with her busy son living in America, making heartfelt efforts to bridge the distance and win back his attention.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Muddina Kanmani
subTitle: Shivaram's mother desires a grandson. However, when her daughter-in-law gives birth to a baby girl, Shivaram decides to bring home his friend's newborn son.

title: Samayada Gombe
subTitle: Young Anil flees his home, fearing police arrest, and is adopted by Rangappa, a lorry driver, who renames him Guru. Years later, an unexpected twist of fate reunites him with his long-lost sister.

title: Sahukara
subTitle: Muthu, a faithful servant, works for Sahukara. However, when Sahukara realises Ranganayaki, the one he loves likes Muthu, he throws Muthu out of the house.

title: Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy
subTitle: Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy, the ruler of the Rayalaseema region, resists the tyranny of the East India Company and sparks a revolution in the process.

title: Daasa
subTitle: Mohan Das, devoted to his mother, is thrown into turmoil when she is falsely accused of murder, forcing him into a desperate struggle to clear her name and uncover the truth.

title: Kolegaara
subTitle: Karthikeyan, a police officer, investigates a murder case and suspects two women to be involved. However, the women's neighbour claims to be the killer.
